max_sentences: 4
topic: what the recipe pre-flight canary does and when it fires
facts:
- a 1-token probe hits the resolved model before the full templated request on every recipe call
- it uses curl with a deadline of DELEGATE_PREFLIGHT_TIMEOUT, default 10 seconds
- if the probe does not return in time the wrapper exits 3 with an actionable stderr message
- the canary is skipped on bare non-recipe calls where input investment is low
- opt out with DELEGATE_NO_PREFLIGHT=1
